Proxy: aggressive-side fwd on same symbol; detailed in forward_by_mark for buyer_agg vs seller_agg.

negative_results: No single Mark×horizon cell yet meets institutional 'edge' without out-of-sample sim; tape is 3 days only.
Trade count O(1e3) vs price rows O(1e5): many BBO timestamps have no prints — forward joins are sparse for some symbols.
